Git With Her 2026

An 8-hour, women-only hackathon for builders across every field.
Sunday, 23 August 2026  ·  ImagineEdge Workspace, Mysuru
Presented by Catalyst  ·  Powered by Webstor Labs
Who we are

Catalyst

A community where women across every field belong, learn, and grow — one opportunity at a time.
We are not only for software. We bring together women in software, electronics, civil, mechanical, design and beyond — students, early-career professionals and career-switchers — and connect them through hands-on events, mentorship and a network that keeps showing up.

Git With Her is our flagship hackathon.

women in the community

Catalyst · Git With Her 202604
Your audience

Who you'll reach.

✦
Students & fresh graduates
Engineering and design students from Mysuru and nearby colleges, hungry for their first real build and first employer.
✦
Early-career professionals
Women 0–4 years into their careers, actively upskilling and open to new roles, tools and communities.
✦
Career switchers & returners
Women moving into tech-adjacent work or returning after a break — high intent, loyal to those who back them.
Catalyst · Git With Her 202605
The case for partnering

Why sponsor Git With Her.

◈
Brand visibility
Your logo on the stage, t-shirts, banners, website and every social post — seen by participants, colleges and our wider community before, during and after.
✦
Talent & hiring
Meet 100+ motivated women in person, watch them build under pressure, and get first access to a curated pool of resumes and standout candidates.
♡
Impact & goodwill
Be publicly counted among the brands investing in women in tech. Authentic CSR that your team, customers and future hires genuinely respect.
